title: Adoption of the Irish Constitution
shortDescription: Ireland adopted its Constitution containing 'Directive Principles of Social Policy' (Article 45), which was inspired by the Spanish Constitution.
importance: Primary blueprint for Part IV of the Indian Constitution.

title: Constituent Assembly Debates on DPSPs
shortDescription: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar and Sir B.N. Rau championed the inclusion of Directive Principles in the Draft Constitution.
importance: Described as 'novel features' aimed at establishing economic democracy.

title: Champakam Dorairajan vs. State of Madras
shortDescription: The Supreme Court ruled that Fundamental Rights prevail over Directive Principles in case of any conflict.
importance: Established that DPSPs must run subsidiary to Fundamental Rights; led to 1st Amendment.

title: 25th Constitutional Amendment Act
shortDescription: Inserted Article 31C, giving primacy to Directive Principles under Article 39(b) and 39(c).

title: Swaran Singh Committee & 42nd CAA
shortDescription: Added Part IVA (Article 51A) with 10 Fundamental Duties and inserted four new DPSPs (39A, 43A, 48A).
importance: Landmark addition of citizen duties and modern welfare directives.

title: 44th Constitutional Amendment Act
importance: Directs the State to minimize inequalities in income, status, and opportunities.

title: Minerva Mills vs. Union of India
shortDescription: Supreme Court held that the Constitution is founded on the balance between Fundamental Rights and DPSPs.
importance: Neither Part III nor Part IV holds absolute supremacy over the other.

title: Verma Committee Report on Fundamental Duties
shortDescription: Identified existing legal provisions for enforcing certain Fundamental Duties.
importance: Mapped duties to statutory acts like Wildlife Protection Act and Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act.

title: 86th Constitutional Amendment Act
shortDescription: Added the 11th Fundamental Duty under Article 51A(k) for parents/guardians to provide education to children aged 6–14.
importance: Tripartite change connecting Article 21A, Article 45, and Article 51A(k).

title: 97th Constitutional Amendment Act
shortDescription: Added Article 43B under DPSPs for promoting co-operative societies.
importance: Directs State to promote autonomous functioning of co-operatives.
